calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Stephen K. Lighfoot, Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff Robert Simpson.
Richard sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff Robert Simpson.
No appearance by Defendants Mark Harris and Francisco Jauregui.
Request for Entry of Judgment against Defendant Francisco Jaureguui; and Does 1-10.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited and terminated.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 4018 19th Street, #5, San Francisco, CA 94114.
Damages $2,135.00
Holdover damages $2,988.72
Pre-judgment interest $
Attorney's Fees $3,095.00 against Defendant Mark Harris, only.
Costs $538.95
for a Total Judgment of $8,756.72 against Defendant Mark Harris. Total Judgment Amount of $5,661.72 against Defendant Francisco Jauregui.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on THUR-FEB-07-2013:
Plaintiff ROBERT SIMPSON is present with Attorney Stephen Lightfoot, II

Defendant MARK HARRIS is not present.

This settlement conference is placed off calendar. The trial date of
FEB-11-2013 remains on calendar.
